raw_consumer_statement:
Dear CFPB, On XX/XX/XXXX, I bought tickets for a concert on Front Standing Right location. The tickets I bought had original release date XX/XX/XXXX. This was later changed to XX/XX/XXXX and I asked why the change. The answer was that the bought tickets were going to be on XX/XX/XXXX. On XX/XX/XXXX the tickets did not arrive, and the date was changed to XX/XX/XXXX, the day of the concert. I contacted them again and the answer weas that the bought tickets will be delivered on that date. 

The day before of the concert my I was notified that the tickets changed and that they told me We have no control over seating or production changes within the venue, and I was not given the option for refund. On the day of the concert, my fears about having a bad service materialized, as the tickets were unilaterally changed last minute for tickets of different quality and characteristics. 

I started a dispute with my Credit Card company and I was denied the claim. In light of that unfair situation, I come to you with proof all my efforts with the merchant to get things in time, plus the answer of the credit card company. 

Kind regards, XXXX XXXX
